name: project-legibility
description: Keep projects understandable, reviewable, and changeable as agent work accumulates.

interface.shortDescription: Keep projects changeable as agent work accumulates.
interface.longDescription: Strengthen code structure, decision criteria, and working context as Codex implements, fixes, refactors, and resumes repository work.
defaultPrompt: Implement this feature and verify that existing behavior still works.
Refactor this code so it stays easy to understand and change.
Find the work in progress in this repository and continue it from the current context.
